title: A 12-node peer-blind relay. A new signal arrives and one path re-renders; a no-change re-wake memo-skips the whole relay; cost scales with surprise, never the clock.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: cold start · all 12 nodes render once · scouts fan out peer-blind · masker projects per-consumer view facets · synthesizer commits over the full trail

beats.name: surprise-s2
beats.caption: a NEW signal (S2) arrives · the gateway memo-misses · the relay re-renders down its path · fresh tokens spike with the surprise

beats.name: quiet-skip
beats.caption: a byte-identical re-wake · the GATEWAY memo-SKIPS and nothing downstream wakes · no facet moves · no lane lights · fresh 0 — the flat-line

beats.name: surprise-s3
beats.caption: a third distinct signal (S3) · another surprise spike · the masked projections re-derive deterministically
